title: Automation of a trigger in one board to another
excerpt: Is there a way to say “when the subitem column of ‘checkbox’ is checked, set the status to ‘In Progress’ on another board”? I dont want anything to move from a board, I just want want the completion of a subitem to trigg…

posts.author: McKennaOMG (McKenna Dorame)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to say “when the subitem column of ‘checkbox’ is checked, set the status to ‘In Progress’ on another board”? I dont want anything to move from a board, I just want want the completion of a subitem to trigger another task on another board to begin.

Thank you,
